name: gsb-ai-data-driven-case06-regex-job-poc
description: Case 06: Regex log parsing - S3 text source with REGEXP_EXTRACT to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 Text Source - case06_regex","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"value","Type":"string"}]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case06_regex/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"tab","WithHeader":false}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '^(\\\\d{2}\\\\.\\\\d{2}\\\\.\\\\d{4})', 1) AS LOG_DATE, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '^\\\\d{2}\\\\.\\\\d{2}\\\\.\\\\d{4}\\\\s+(\\\\d{2}:\\\\d{2}:\\\\d{2})', 1) AS LOG_TIME, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '\\\\[(\\\\d+\\\\.\\\\d+\\\\.\\\\d+\\\\.\\\\d+)\\\\]', 1) AS IP_ADDRESS, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '\\\\]\\\\s+(\\\\S+)\\\\s+\\\\d+\\\\s+ms', 1) AS URL, CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '(\\\\d+)\\\\s+ms', 1) AS INTEGER) AS RESPONSE_TIME_MS, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, 'P:\\\\s+(\\\\w+)', 1) AS USERNAME, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, 'CID\\\\s+IN\\\\s+\\\\(([^)]+)\\\\)', 1) AS CID, REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, 'CIF\\\\.ACN\\\\s*=\\\\s*(\\\\d+)', 1) AS CIF, CASE WHEN value LIKE '%ERROR%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ERROR_FLAG, CURRENT_DATE() AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(value)) > 0 AND (REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '^(\\\\d{2}\\\\.\\\\d{2}\\\\.\\\\d{4})', 1) IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_EXTRACT(value, '^(\\\\d{2}\\\\.\\\\d{2}\\\\.\\\\d{4})', 1) != '')"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case06_regex","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case06_regex/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
